notes: Chunks 25-27 reconciled and pushed to main 2026-06-05. ROOT CAUSE FIX: three parallel routine runs (branches youthful-volta-fHktH, youthful-volta-ubyDO, eloquent-bell-grEAl) each built a 'chunk 25' on its own claude/* feature branch and never merged to main. build-to-live.yml fires only on push to main, so none deployed, and main never advanced past next_chunk 25, so each run rebuilt chunk 25 with different routes. All three batches combined here into one main commit, overlaps deduped (india-to-uk, india-to-us, uk-to-china, us-to-china were in all three; grEAl version kept). 54 unique Template C Tier A route files, all QA passed (zero em dashes, no banned vocab, Marcus Webb author, no Gareth). Net +37 new route slugs, 17 placeholder upgrades. Corridors: Spain/Italy/Portugal/Thailand/Malaysia/Philippines/Vietnam/NZ (fHktH+ubyDO) plus China/India/Ireland/UAE/HK/Germany/France/Australia (grEAl). Counted as chunks 25-27 (three batches). Routes 5217 -> 5254, pages 6003 -> 6040. Next chunk 28 (Template D, Tier A). DURABLE FIX STILL NEEDED: routine must push to main (its STEP 3 says so, but a conflicting feature-branch requirement overrode it). Blog Day 6 (europe-to-uk-pet-transport) also next.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
